description: Matter considered for its composition, use, or transformation is 'muralo'. 'thena' (thing) points to an entity; material asks what that entity is made from or what can be done with it. 'panuri' (resource) and 'whemori' (waste) describe a relation to a purpose rather than the substance itself.
articulatory_notes: Voiced nasal 'm' starts at closed lips and opens into rounded high-back 'u'. A tap or brief trill releases stressed central 'a'; lateral 'l' then carries the voice into final rounded 'o'.
usage_notes: The noun works in mass and countable settings. A technical description can supply composition or grade when the broad material name is too wide.

pillars.solarpunk-values: A fallen board can be material in a repair, a resource to one group, and waste to another. 'muralo' holds the substance steady while people examine those changing relations.

semantic_domains.creation: matter selected for making or transformation
semantic_domains.physical: substance considered through its composition or properties
